interfaces.name: Habit
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Habit { var id: UUID; var name: String; var costPerUse: Double?; var usesPerDay: Double?; var createdAt: Date; var currentStreakStartedAt: Date; var lifetimeCleanDays: Int; var sortIndex: Int }
interfaces.notes: costPerUse/usesPerDay are a linked optional pair; store layer enforces both-or-neither, never partially guessed.

interfaces.name: ResetEvent
interfaces.signature: @Model final class ResetEvent { var id: UUID; var habitID: UUID; var occurredAt: Date; var streakLengthAtReset: Int }
interfaces.notes: Written only after the 5s undo window elapses; never written speculatively.

interfaces.name: CravingSession
interfaces.signature: @Model final class CravingSession { var id: UUID; var habitID: UUID; var flowVariant: CravingFlowVariant; var startedAt: Date; var expectedDuration: TimeInterval; var state: CravingSessionState; var resolvedAt: Date? }
interfaces.notes: state resolved by scenePhase hook (polite backgrounding) and a launch-time sweep (force-quit) per ios_architecture_review.

interfaces.name: CravingSessionState
interfaces.signature: enum CravingSessionState: String, Codable { case started, completed, abandoned }
interfaces.notes: Never write only .completed as a default; abandoned must be a real, honestly-reachable state.

interfaces.name: CravingFlowVariant
interfaces.signature: enum CravingFlowVariant: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case rideItOut, breathingPaced, textSomeone, delayAndReassess }
interfaces.notes: rideItOut is the v1 must-have; others are should/could-have, gated by EntitlementStore for non-free users.

interfaces.name: SchemaV1
interfaces.signature: enum SchemaV1: VersionedSchema { static var models: [any PersistentModel.Type] { [Habit.self, ResetEvent.self, CravingSession.self] }; static var versionIdentifier: Schema.Version { Schema.Version(1,0,0) } }
interfaces.notes: FreedayMigrationPlan wraps this; trivial today, real slot for 1.1 fields.

interfaces.name: HabitSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct HabitSnapshot: Codable, Equatable { let habitID: UUID; let habitName: String; let currentStreakDays: Int; let lifetimeCleanDays: Int; let savingsAmount: Double?; let lastUpdated: Date }
interfaces.notes: The ONLY type the widget/Live Activity extension may read; written atomically to the App Group container alongside every SwiftData mutation. Widget extension has zero SwiftData import.

interfaces.name: DateProvider
interfaces.notes: Injected into StreakCalculator; production impl returns Date(), test impl returns a fixed/advancing Date.

interfaces.name: StreakCalculator
interfaces.signature: struct StreakCalculator { init(dateProvider: DateProvider, calendar: Calendar = .current); func currentStreakDays(startedAt: Date) -> Int; func isSameDay(_ a: Date, _ b: Date) -> Bool; func dayOneDate(referenceNow: Date) -> Date }
interfaces.notes: Sole owner of all day-boundary math; app, widget, and Live Activity must all call through this, never reimplement.

interfaces.name: SavingsCalculator
interfaces.signature: func computeSavings(costPerUse: Double?, usesPerDay: Double?, streakDays: Int) -> Double?
interfaces.notes: Returns nil unless BOTH costPerUse and usesPerDay are set; never guesses a frequency.

interfaces.name: ClockProtocol
interfaces.signature: protocol ClockProtocol { associatedtype Instant: InstantProtocol; func now() -> Instant }
interfaces.notes: Thin wrapper so CravingSession timing can be tested against a fake advancing clock instead of real ContinuousClock wall time.

interfaces.name: HabitStore
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class HabitStore { func addHabit(name: String, costPerUse: Double?, usesPerDay: Double?) throws; func resetStreak(habitID: UUID) throws; func logCravingSession(habitID: UUID, variant: CravingFlowVariant, state: CravingSessionState, startedAt: Date, expectedDuration: TimeInterval) throws; func habits() -> [Habit]; func currentSnapshot(for habitID: UUID) -> HabitSnapshot }
interfaces.notes: Sole owner of ModelContext; every mutating call synchronously writes SwiftData + HabitSnapshot + calls WidgetCenter.shared.reloadAllTimelines() in that order, no background dispatch.

interfaces.name: EntitlementStore
interfaces.signature: protocol EntitlementStore { var isSubscribed: Bool { get }; func refresh() async; func canAddHabit(currentCount: Int) -> Bool; func canUseFlowVariant(_ variant: CravingFlowVariant) -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: Views/HabitStore check this rather than calling Transaction.currentEntitlements directly, per ios_architecture_review; downgrade never deletes Habit rows, only future-gates.

interfaces.name: GuidedFlowStep
interfaces.signature: enum GuidedFlowStep: Codable { case breatheIn(seconds: Double); case breatheOut(seconds: Double); case message(text: String, holdSeconds: Double); case progressCheckpoint }
interfaces.notes: Bundled per-variant as JSON (e.g. Content/rideItOut.json); one generic CravingFlowPlayerView steps through whatever script it is handed.

interfaces.name: GuidedFlowScript
interfaces.signature: struct GuidedFlowScript: Codable { let variant: CravingFlowVariant; let totalDuration: TimeInterval; let steps: [GuidedFlowStep] }
interfaces.notes: Loaded from bundled JSON at flow start; totalDuration seeds both the progress ring and the Live Activity sessionEndDate.

interfaces.name: AppState
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class AppState { var presentation: Presentation }; enum Presentation { case none, onboarding, cravingTimer(Habit, CravingFlowVariant), milestoneCard(Habit), paywall }
interfaces.notes: Single enum-driven source of truth for all .sheet/.fullScreenCover presentation off the root NavigationStack.

interfaces.name: MilestoneCardRenderer
interfaces.signature: func renderMilestoneCard(habitName: String, streakDays: Int, savingsAmount: Double?, size: CGSize) -> Image
interfaces.notes: Uses ImageRenderer against a standalone MilestoneCardView hierarchy, never a screenshot of Home; must render correctly with savingsAmount == nil.

interfaces.name: CravingSessionActivityAttributes
interfaces.signature: struct CravingSessionActivityAttributes: ActivityAttributes { struct ContentState: Codable, Hashable { var habitName: String; var sessionEndDate: Date; var flowVariant: CravingFlowVariant }; var habitID: UUID }
interfaces.notes: ContentState is set once at start and not updated per-second; Live Activity UI renders Text(timerInterval:countsDown:) natively. .end() called from the same code path as session completion/abandonment.

interfaces.name: HabitSnapshotWriter
interfaces.signature: protocol HabitSnapshotWriter { func write(_ snapshot: HabitSnapshot) throws; func read(habitID: UUID) -> HabitSnapshot? }
interfaces.notes: Backed by a JSON file in the App Group container; widget/Live Activity extension only ever calls read(), app target only ever calls write().
